channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Crew mistakes caused the sinking of a New Zealand navy ship off Samoan coast, inquiry finds
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Mistakes by members of the crew caused a New Zealand navy ship to plow into a reef off the coast of Samoa, where it caught fire and sank, according to the preliminary findings of a military Court of Inquiry released Friday.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Suspected gunman who fired more than 200 rounds at Florida condo units killed by sniper's bullet, sheriff says
item.description: Florida authorities shot and killed a man Thursday who allegedly fired more than 200 rounds at neighboring units in a condominium complex.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Silvia Pinal, an actress in Mexico's Golden Age of cinema, has died at 93
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Silvia Pinal, an actress from Mexico’s Golden Age of cinema in the 1940s and 50s, has died. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Georgia suspends talks on joining the European Union and accuses the bloc of blackmail
item.description: TBILISI, Georgia (AP) — Georgia is suspending talks on its bid to join the European Union for four years, its prime minister said Thursday, in view of what he described as “blackmail and manipulation” from some of the bloc's politicians.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIKO MEGRELIDZE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sotheby's settles with New York for $6.25M over tax fraud
item.description: The iconic New York City auction house Sotheby's agreed to pay over $6 for allegedly helping clients avoid millions in sales tax.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Thanksgiving tradition still going strong after 130 years
item.description: Many are without family members or friends during the holiday season, but Central Union Mission is making sure everyone has a seat at its Thanksgiving table.
item.dc:creator: Tyger Munn, NewsNation

item.title: Black bear dines on Thanksgiving trash in San Gabriel Valley
item.description: Friends and family weren't the only ones to enjoy a Thanksgiving meal on Thursday, although this entree was significantly less traditional. A black bear was spotted rummaging through a trash can for a Thanksgiving meal at a home on the 400 block of Wedgewood Court in Duarte.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: Hate and fear in the Windy City
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Expert tips on how to avoid feeling drowsy after Thanksgiving dinner
item.description: Americans nationwide will enjoy a Thanksgiving dinner with all the fixings and will likely feel tired afterward.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Displaced families in Lebanon who return home are faced with piles of rubble
item.description: HANOUIYEH, Lebanon (AP) — During their 37 years of marriage, Mariam Kourani and her husband ran a butcher shop in southern Lebanon, started a business selling serving containers and opened a small restaurant. An Israeli airstrike in late September destroyed it all.
item.dc:creator: BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump's tariffs in his first term did little to alter the economy, but this time could be different
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump loved to use tariffs on foreign goods during his first presidency. But their impact was barely noticeable in the overall economy, even if their aftershocks were clear in specific industries. The data show they never fully delivered on his promised factory jobs.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade: Big balloons, wet weather and 21 protesters arrested
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade marched, soared and roared into its second century on Thursday despite a drenching rain and a brief disruption from pro-Palestinian demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Returning from a Thanksgiving trip? Watch out for rain, snow
item.description: Travelers who spoke to NewsNation Thursday said the TSA was prepared for the number of passengers coming their way.
item.dc:creator: Xavier Walton, NewsNation

item.title: Jon Batiste, Ledisi, Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle to perform during Super Bowl pregame
item.description: The Super Bowl pregame will have some Louisiana flavor: Multi-talented performer Jon Batiste will hit the stage to sing the national anthem, while Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle are slated to perform “America the Beautiful.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Day 2 of the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire sees Israeli airstrike on Lebanon and scattered attacks
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Israel on Thursday carried out its first airstrike on Lebanon since a truce with Hezbollah announced this week, saying it targeted the militant group's activity at a rocket storage facility in southern Lebanon that breached the ceasefire.
item.dc:creator: KAREEM CHEHAYEB and JULIA FRANKEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Car tied to wealthy NY couple missing for 44 years pulled from murky pond
item.description: A car and human remains likely belonging to a couple who vanished 44 years ago was pulled from a pond in Georgia last week near a hotel they were staying in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona executions to resume, breaking 2-year pause during review of state death penalty procedures
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Executions will resume in Arizona following a two-year pause, the state's top prosecutor says.
item.dc:creator: ANITA SNOW, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Chick-fil-A brings back fan-favorite holiday treats, unveils new merch and app
item.description: Chick-fil-A brought back a fan-favorite dessert just in time for the holiday season. The chicken chain announced its holiday offerings, which include the returning Peppermint Chip Milkshake, other seasonal items and festive merch. The seasonal food and merch made its grand return on Nov. 18.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Northeast hit with rain, snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities
item.description: The U.S. Northeast has been hit with a winter storm that has brought rain and snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities and disrupted travel plans for those moving around on the holiday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Is your turkey dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Photos: 100 years of the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: The parade in New York City, presented by department store chain Macy's, was first held in 1924 under the heading "Macy's Christmas Parade" to promote holiday sales and spotlight the newly expanded and, at the time, largest in the world Herald Square store in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Caldwell, Stacker, ABC 4

item.title: See the 10 worst airports for on-time Thanksgiving travel: report
item.description: Depending on what airport your friends or relatives are flying out of, you may want to show a little extra compassion this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, NewsNation

item.title: Texas man overcomes chronic pain, 5-year pill addiction
item.description: Eric Bumpus, a 43-year-old husband and father of two, reflects on five years of living with an addiction to pain pills.
item.dc:creator: Jose Torres, NewsNation

item.title: Black Friday smart TVs are cheaper than ever — Samsung, LG and more
item.description: If you’re looking for a new TV this year, read our guide on the best Cyber Monday TV deals. We cover the deepest discounts and where to find them.
item.dc:creator: Jmar Gambol, NewsNation

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Trump's threat to impose tariffs could raise prices for consumers, colliding with promise for relief
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If Donald Trump makes good on his threat to slap 25% tariffs on everything imported from Mexico and Canada, the price increases that could follow will collide with his campaign promise to give American families a break from inflation.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: San Francisco watchdog Ricci Wynne arrested, suspected of pimping
item.description: Wynne has legions of social media followers. Over the past three years, videos posted on his social media pages, RawRicci415, garnered hundreds of thousands of views.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, Fox 5

item.title: Israel approves proposed ceasefire with Lebanon's Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Tuesday recommended his Cabinet approve a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: JOSEF FEDERMAN, KAREEM CHEHAYEB and BASSEM MROUE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Walmart becomes largest company to roll back diversity, equity and inclusion policies
item.description: Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, is rolling back its diversity, equity and inclusion policies, joining a growing list of major corporations that have done the same after coming under attack by conservative activists.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 24-year-old man dies while hanging Christmas lights at California home
item.description: A 24-year-old man died by electrocution while installing Christmas lights on the roof of a home in Southern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, WGN 9

item.title: A voting machine firm suing Fox News now wants to probe Murdoch family trust fight
item.description: Lawyers for a voting machine company that’s suing Fox News want to question founder Rupert Murdoch about his contentious efforts to change his family trust, the attorneys told a court Monday.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Menendez brothers' resentencing request hearing pushed back to January
item.description: The Menendez brothers have waiting nearly three decades, and now they'll have to wait a little longer to hear their fates.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MAP: Every state's favorite Thanksgiving side, according to Campbell's
item.description: The Thanksgiving turkey won’t be the star of the show in some households this holiday season, according to a recent study.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, WGN 9

item.title: Special counsel moves to dismiss election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith asked a federal judge on Monday to dismiss the case accusing President-elect Donald Trump of plotting to overturn the 2020 election, citing longstanding Justice Department policy shielding presidents from prosecution while in office.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: First right whales of season gorge on critical food off Massachusetts, giving hope for a strong year
item.description: Scientists who study a critically endangered species of whale that lives off New England said encouraging early signs suggest the animals could have a strong season for feeding and breeding.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 1 dead after DHL cargo plane crashes in Lithuania; officials 'cannot rule out' terrorism
item.description: Lithuanian officials said they were investigating the cause of the crash, and "cannot rule out" terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Siarhei Satsiuk, Fox 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal
item.description: Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5
